workplan: Ingest business data, search live web for competitors and trends, extract anomalies.
output_summary: Found insights and integrated live trends.

workplan: Generate action chain, verify budget constraints, and predict ROI.
reasoning: Humne sales mein kami ko dekhte hue aur muqablay ki offers ko samne rakhte hue ye faisla kiya hai ke hum teen qadam uthayenge. Pehle hum muqablay mein apni offers denge taake customers wapas aayen. Phir hum garmiyon ke mausam ke liye khaas campaign chalayenge jismein thandi cheezein promote hongi. Akhir mein, hum social media par apni campaigns ko zyada logon tak pahunchayenge. Ye sab PKR 15000 ke budget mein kiya jayega taake hamari sales dobara barhein aur hum market mein apni jagah wapas bana sakein.
decision: Sales mein kami ko rokne aur garmiyon ke mausam ka faida uthane ke liye muqablay ki offers aur social media promotion ki jayegi, PKR 15000 ke budget mein.
